name: Hookify
description: Auto-loading hook rules — write a markdown file in ~/.opencomputer/<profile>/hookify/ describing a rule (warn-rm-rf, block-env-edit, …) and the plugin registers it as a PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Stop / UserPromptSubmit hook automatically. Each rule has YAML frontmatter (event, action, conditions) plus a markdown message body. Rules can be enabled/disabled without deletion. Companion to the hookify-rules-helper skill that teaches how to write the rules.
author: OpenComputer Contributors (port of Anthropic's hookify plugin)
